title: WatcherGuru: Brent crude oil falls after reports US and Iran discussing 45-day ceasefire
snippet: JUST IN: Brent crude oil falls after reports the US and Iran are discussing a 45-day ceasefire that could permanently end the war. 329 replies, 344 reposts, 2205 likes, 170K views

title: Axios/Barak Ravid: US and Iran discussing 45-day ceasefire terms
snippet: In last-ditch push, the US, Iran and a group of regional mediators are discussing the terms for a potential 45-day ceasefire that could lead to a permanent end to the war, according to four US, Israeli and regional sources.

title: WSJ confirms Iran rejected US temporary ceasefire proposal in Strait of Hormuz
snippet: The WSJ confirms that Iran has rejected the US proposal for a temporary ceasefire in the Strait of Hormuz. Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt mediators trying but Iran refuses. Trump busted lying again.

title: WatcherGuru: Bitcoin $69,000, $100M crypto shorts liquidated in 90 minutes
snippet: JUST IN: $69,000 Bitcoin. $100,000,000 worth of crypto shorts liquidated in the past 90 minutes. 340 replies, 663 reposts, 4597 likes, 213K views

title: Gold markets on a roller coaster: $4,630/oz recovering from 1.6% dip
snippet: Gold markets are on a roller coaster today as geopolitical tensions clash with ceasefire hopes. Gold recovers to $4,630/oz after a 1.6% dip. Axios reports talks of a 45-day ceasefire. Trump maintains threats of escalation in Iran.

title: Trump: No it's war (NBC on F-15E shootdown impact on talks)
snippet: Trump asked if downed jet to impact talks: No it's war. NBC News

title: MSN/WSJ: Trump convenes national security team as US Air Force has worst day in war; Iran refuses ceasefire
snippet: Trump convenes national security team as US Air Force has worst day in war and Iran refuses ceasefire.

title: Bloomberg: Gold fell after Trump renewed threats to destroy Iran's power plants
snippet: Gold fell, after US President Donald Trump renewed threats to destroy Iran's power plants and Tehran showed little sign of accepting American demands to end the war in the Middle East.

title: Qatar declined to serve as lead mediator for US-Iran ceasefire - WSJ/Reuters
snippet: Qatar told US officials it is not eager to spearhead negotiations, further stalling diplomatic efforts.

title: Trump hints at worst-case scenario after US F-15E pilot missing in Iran
snippet: Trump hints at chilling worst-case scenario after US F-15E crew goes missing in Iran.
